description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a prominent multi-faceted hip roof and a symmetrical front facade. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding with dark roof panels and large windows, providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes landscaped lawns, a decorative front garden, and a backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and outdoor dining area. The rear of the house opens to a spacious yard, ideal for recreation and gatherings. The structure appears to be a single-story residence with a wide footprint and multiple entry points. Architectural details include clean lines, geometric roof shapes, and a blend of contemporary and traditional elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a multi-faceted hip roof, large windows, landscaped yards, and a backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical landscaping, and decorative garden with a low fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular roof, side lawn, and partial view of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, outdoor dining area, and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, angular roof, and a clear view of the backyard amenities.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with a small porch, flanked by symmetrical landscaping and a decorative garden, no visible columns or overhangs.
